breakthrough: Founding of AI as an academic discipline at the Dartmouth workshop
impact: Established AI as a formal field of research, initiating the "golden years" of early success.
key figure: John McCarthy, Marvin Minsky, Allen Newell, Herbert Simon
lasting effect: Defined the traditional goals of the field and dominated the research agenda for the next twenty years.

breakthrough: IBM's Deep Blue defeats world chess champion Garry Kasparov
impact: Became the first computer system to beat a reigning world champion under tournament conditions.
lasting effect: Demonstrated the power of adversarial search and evaluation, marking a milestone in machine strategy.

breakthrough: Deep learning revolution and the success of AlexNet using GPUs
impact: Deep learning began to dominate industry benchmarks, outperforming previous AI techniques.
key figure: Geoffrey Hinton, Alex Krizhevsky, Ilya Sutskever
lasting effect: Triggered a massive increase in funding and shifted the entire field toward neural networks and large-scale data.

impact: Revolutionized natural language processing by using attention mechanisms.
lasting effect: Underpins modern LLMs and generative AI tools like ChatGPT, enabling the current AI boom.

breakthrough: Launch of ChatGPT and the breakout of Generative AI
impact: Became the fastest-growing consumer application, bringing AI into global public consciousness.
key figure: Sam Altman, Greg Brockman, Ilya Sutskever (OpenAI)
lasting effect: Initiated an aggressive AI boom with billions in investment and widespread societal debate on ethics and risks.
